entry.title: Re: How to post GR for a consumable material without PO and directly consume it in MIGO?
entry.content: @raymond_giuseppi I think that the posting should credit a cost account and debit either vendor payables or a GR/IR account.

entry.title: Re: How to post GR for a consumable material without PO a...
entry.content:
Hello @Adel_Rihan 

If you want to "receive" a consumable material without PO, then it is not really a material movement. That would more of a FI/CO posting to credit a cost account and debit either a GR/IR account or vendor payables.

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Re: 2V8 – Advanced Financial Closing
entry.content: Hi, this no longer exists in SAP Process Navigator- is it called something else now?

entry.title: Need Validation to Prevent Output Trigger When No Release Strategy is Determined
entry.content:
Dear SAP Team,

We have recently implemented a new release strategy for Purchase Orders (POs) based on the parameters: purchasing group, document type, and order net value. After the implementation, the business is attempting to re-trigger the release strategy for blocked POs by modifying the purchasing group.

 

Issue Description:

• Users are changing the purchasing group to a value that does not meet the release strategy criteria (for both local and foreign POs).

• As a result, the system does not determine a release strategy, and the Release Strategy tab is missing when they save the PO.

• Later, when they revert the purchasing group to the correct value, the release strategy gets triggered.

• However, due to the initial incorrect change, the system detects the PO as released as per standard behavior.

• Consequently, the output type is triggered, and a release notification is sent to the supplier, even though the PO was not properly released.

 

Requirement:

 

To avoid this issue, we need to implement a validation to ensure:

1. If the Release Strategy tab is missing, the output type should not trigger, preventing incorrect notifications from being sent to vendors.

2. The system should only trigger the output type after a valid release strategy is determined.

 

Request for Suggestions:

 

Could you please advise:

• What would be the best way to implement this validation?

• Where in SAP can we place this validation (e.g., user exit, BAdI, enhancement spot, etc.)?

• Any other alternative solutions you might suggest?

 

Looking forward to your valuable insights.

 

Best regards,
Abdul.

entry.title: Re: Unlock new levels of productivity with AI in SAP Build
entry.content:
On March 25th, join us live and get expert insights from Bharat Sandhu and @lienards

entry.title: Re: Unable to edit Inspection Lot Stock fields in Make Us...
entry.content:
Hello, 

Please check your roles in the system as described in prerequisities section in below documentation:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d1e58be39d884a0dbf75a7526a9acbf4/ecfae2574096f432e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

Also under 'Manage inspection lots' section you may find lot of useful information that may heklp you resolve your other questions if any pops up:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/d1e58be39d884a0dbf75a7526a9acbf4/ecfae2574096f432e10000000a441470.html?locale=en-US

Reagrds, 

Jagoda

entry.title: Planned process scheduled end date compared to date of requirement/consumption
entry.content: Is there a transaction I could use to compare the scheduled end date of a planned process against the required or consumption date?

entry.title: Re: Screen Personas 400 Session timed out error when clic...
entry.content:
This sounds more like a webgui/ITS issue and not a Personas one. Something related to general session handling.

Do you have the same problem when you disable Personas using the URL parameter sap-personas-runmode=0 (with no blue line on top of the browser window and no Personas "P"), or is the problem only present when a flavor is active?

Also, I'd check the timeout settings for all related services (personas, personas3, webgui). Do you have anything set there or is it at 00:00:00 (off), which is the default? How about the profile parameter values related to session timeout? For these, involve your basis team for advice. Profile parameter rdisp/plugin_auto_logout controls the default value, but there may be others that are relevant here.

Lastly, was there any other upgrade than going from an older Personas SP to SP19? If yes, then that may also have an effect on your browser sessions and system behavior regarding timeout. A pure Personas SP upgrade should / will not cause such a difference.

These are only first guesses based on what you described, but if this doesn't help, then access to the system and more in-depth troubleshooting would be necessary.

entry.title: Re: CDS View Metadata Tool (Base Table/Field Information)
entry.content: There is an error -  Type "IF_DD_DDL_UTILITIES" is unknown.

how is example of query in this API?

entry.title: Re: SAP BDC integration with Datasphere and SAC
entry.content:
Hi @deshmukh ,

SAP Business Data Cloud brings together Datasphere, SAC, and BW are key components in one unified experience. You can continue using Datasphere and SAC without interruption, and overtime will have the option to transition to SAP Business Data Cloud.

To optimize the most used objects in SAP BW, you can transition to BW private cloud edition to consume SAP BW data as data products in SAP Business Data Cloud.

entry.title: Re: On-Premise AI Excellence: How SAP HANA EE and Skybuffer AI Deliver
entry.content: Replied as a private message.

entry.title: Re: Transaction Type OF OINM TABLE
entry.content:
in SAP B1, OINM not is a table, is a View that is make for:

[OIVL] T0 INNER JOIN [IVL1] T1 ON T0.[TransSeq] = T1.[TransSeq] 

LEFT OUTER JOIN [OIVQ] T2 ON T1.[TransSeq] = T2.[TransSeq] AND T1.[LayerID] = T2.[LayerID] 

INNER JOIN [OIVK] T3 ON T1.[TransSeq] = T3.[TransSeq] AND T1.[LayerID] = T3.[LayerID] 

INNER JOIN [OILM] T4 ON T0.[MessageID] = T4.[MessageID] 

LEFT OUTER JOIN [OADM] T5 ON T5.[Code] = T5.[Code]

If you make a Query is best use this tables.

entry.title: Re: No. Message: M8_2081 Purchasing document from SAP TM,...
entry.content:
Hello @Celest333 

SAP Help Prerequisites: Invoice Processing (MM-IV/SD-BIL) - TM

You must set up the user parameter TM_INVOICE_CLERK in the user data accordingly. With the user parameter TM_INVOICE_CLERK, you control which tabs the user sees when entering or changing incoming invoices in the transactions MIRO and MIR7, in change mode in the transaction MIR4, and in GR/IR clearing account maintenance in the transaction MR11.

The user parameter has the following alternatives:

Blank

In invoice creation, the user sees the TM Reference and PO Reference tabs, as well as the G/L Account tab that is visible according to Customizing.

01

The user only sees the TM Reference tab and, depending on Customizing, the G/L Account tab. The PO Reference tab is hidden.

02

The user does not see the TM Reference tab, but sees the PO Reference tab, as well as all tabs that are visible according to Customizing (Material Account, G/L Account, and Contract Reference).

It is also explained in the note 2749929 - Invoice creation for Service PO fails with error "A Purchasing document comes from SAP TM: selection not possible" M8_2081

Best regards

Dominik Tylczynski

entry.title: Purpose of a Data Product in the Context of SAP
entry.content:
A Data Product in SAP serves several key purposes, primarily revolving around the efficient and standardized sharing and consumption of data across various applications and domains. Here are the main purposes:
 

1. Data Sharing Across Domains

Data Products enable the sharing of data across domains and application boundaries, facilitating integration and consumption by different applications, including SAP, customer, and partner applications

2. Consumption via APIs

Data Products are exposed for consumption outside the boundaries of the producing application via APIs or Events. This allows applications to offer data for consumption in a standardized manner.

3. High-Quality Metadata

Data Products are described through high-quality metadata, which is accessible through the Data Product Directory. This metadata includes business semantics, making it easier for business users to understand and utilize the data.

4. Optimized for Intensive Reads

The data set within a Data Product is optimized for intensive reads and is consumed in a read-only fashion, ensuring efficient data access and utilization.

5. Data Lineage and Integration

Data Products describe their data lineage via input ports, which are detailed as ORD Integration Dependencies. This helps in understanding the origin and transformation of data within the product.

6. Facilitating Analytical and AI Applications

Data Products are fundamental for building analytical models, designing dashboards, and training AI applications. They make business data accessible and usable to business analysts, data engineers, and data scientists.

7. Decentralized Discoverability

The discoverability of Data Products is decentralized, allowing them to be listed in the Data Product Directory and SAP Business Accelerator Hub, making it easier to find and consume relevant data.

8. Product Mindset

Data Products are managed with a product mindset, ensuring they meet the needs of consumers. Each Data Product has an owner responsible for its definition, delivery, and lifecycle.

 

One of the purpose of a Data Product in SAP Business Data Cloud is to support various analytic scenarios by providing relevant data sets. For example, a data product might include Supplier Data and Classification of Suppliers Based on Risk to support procurement execution and visibility.

Key Points

  • Curated and Enriched Data: Data products are curated and enriched to ensure high quality and relevance for specific business needs.
  • APIs and Metadata: They are exposed for consumption via APIs and described by high-quality metadata.
  • Analytic Scenarios: Data products support various analytic scenarios, such as procurement execution and visibility.
  • Data Packages: Line-of-business leaders can create and deliver data products together with relevant business content (e.g., analytical models and dashboards) in the form of "data packages," which customers can then onboard and activate in their BDC instance.

 

In summary, Data Products in SAP are designed to facilitate efficient data sharing, consumption, and integration across various applications and domains, supported by high-quality metadata and optimized for intensive reads. They play a crucial role in enabling analytical and AI applications and are managed with a product mindset to meet consumer needs.

entry.title: Re: Demystifying Document Management Service on BTP
entry.content: Are there any latest updates on this please

entry.title: Snapshot KF
Re: WFA - Permission artifacts sync job failing
entry.content:
Hi @amfonseca - based on what appear in the log, the issue is with location structure:

Error: System.ArgumentException: Item has already been added. Key in dictionary: '[location].[location].[level1_fra_zznostateprovince_avermes]' Key being added: '[location].[location].[level1_fra_zznostateprovince_avermes]'

If you check using Dimension Editor, you will see two Avermes nodes but with different letter case (i.e. all uppercase or camel case):

This cause the error when processing the structure in artifact sync.  Also, the WFA site is not case sensitive so it also caused application error when I select location structure as hierarchy option.  The log only provides one example but there could be more than one who has the same issue.  You will need to handle this in your query for the structure.  Also, there is another location structure created in Requisition fact table which has the same issue.  You need to fix both of them.

This issue did not occur during initial load or incremental load processing because the back-end processing support case sensitive value and treat them as two different values.  It is just the artifact sync and WFA site are not case sensitive.

entry.title: Re: Export the main process in my SOLDOC to another SOLMA...
entry.content:
Dear Customer,

In Solution Administration, you can export and import the business content of a Solution Documentation branch, for example, scenarios, processes, and library elements.

With the export function, you can export the branch content of a solution to a file in JSON format and store it locally.

With the import function, you can import content from a file into a branch of another solution in the same or different SAP Solution Manager system.

Please kindly see details from the help-on page:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_Solution_Manager/60943adf3ff44893b62c568bb8a87d17/7d856b573f4a0222e10000000a44147b.html

Best Regards,

Sunny

entry.title: Re: Printing a single page from multiple pages using Crys...
entry.content:
More info from SAP R&D:

In the Project you can change the default print button to use PrintToPrinter or PrintOutputController:

Info from R&D:

In Page Range, if you specified the single page number, then it will always printed out the current viewing page in the viewer. But if you specified the page range, it could successfully print out the correct pages.

The PrintOutputController print dialog works well on Win11 24H2 since it’s used our CR print dialog, and also CRW works well.

As workaround, user could change to use PrintOutputController printmode in winform viewer, there’s registry:

  •          32 bit runtime: [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports for .NET Framework 4.0\Crystal Reports for .NET] 
  •          64 bit runtime: [HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE\SOFTWARE\Wow6432Node\SAP BusinessObjects\Crystal Reports for .NET Framework 4.0\Crystal Reports for .NET] 

Add "PrintMode" as String value:

  •          If the value is set to "PrintToPrinter", the WinForm will use PrintToPrinter to print the report. 
  •          If the value is set to "PrintOutputController", the WinForm will use PrintOutputController to print the report. 
  •          If other value is set, this key will not take effect.
  •          Both "PrintToPrinter" and "PrintOutputController" are case insensitive.
  •          This key will override the “PrintMode” set in Crystal Reports Viewer property page.

Or User could add below registry key value to switch to the legacy print dialog for All app:

[HKEY_CURRENT_USER\Software\Microsoft\Print\UnifiedPrintDialog]

"PreferLegacyPrintDialog"=dword:00000001

There's already lots of discussions regarding new print dialog in Win11 on internet and you could see there are many issues with it.

R&D will continue to look into a possible fix or wait to see if Microsoft "fixes" anything.

So for now all SAP can suggest is to not use the new Windows Dialog box and move back to the legacy dialog boxes.

Thanks again

Don

entry.title: PC00_M32_CAFL0 preliminar, reporte previo.
entry.content:
Hola.

Tenemos una situación con la transacción PC00_M32_CAFL0 al ejecutarlo con la opción preliminar, no está generando el reporte previo. 

Esto está sucediendo después de realizar un upgrade al sistema al SP SAP_HR D8,

¿A alguien se le ha presentado esta situación?

¿Saben si hay alguna solución?

Gracias y saludos.

entry.title: Sales Kit Products are not supported in consignment process
entry.content:
I have a Kit item which I cannot do a consignment-issue. When I enter the Kit product in a sales order, the item type is filled as Sales Kit - Header which prevents me from selecting consignment issue as "Consignment Issue".   


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Sales Kit Products are not supported in consignment p...
entry.content:
Dear customer, 

Currently, the sales kit products are not supported in ByDesign system. Kindly check the help center document: Customer Consignment

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/41b25b87b8f247d48ba18c8ff8b90f50.html?q=consignment&locale=en-US

In the Overview, it mentions following statement:

The consignment process in SAP Business ByDesign, supports products with or without batch management (identified stock), with or without Product Requirement Specification (PRS), and serial number managed products. Currently, Kit products are not supported.

Thanks,

Adie

entry.title: Re: EWM PGI for set of outbound deliveries with same Rout...
entry.content:
Hi @gs388 ,

Its hard to say why it is locked, my guess would be like that Cross Delivery HU( Contains multiple delivery items) or may FDO document or product ...Could you please try PGI for multiple ODO in standard PRDO or Monitor ( if you are technical , please take help of your function people) , notice the behaviour and let us know so someone can help you to fix.

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Does BTP Cloud Foundry have the concept of service accounts or service principals?
entry.content:
We have multiple CAP Applications that we deploy using our CI/CD (Azure Pipelines).

The problem right now is that the account being used is tied to a user which is a no-no. It should be a service account or service principal.

I am having trouble finding resources on how to create an service account that isn't tied to a user. Anything I do find requires that the account to be created have an email address. I tried just creating a user via the CF Cli and it doesn't allow me to.

Is this even supported by BTP Cloud Foundry?

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Public Cloud - API to read Storage Locations
entry.content: Remove unnecessary tag and add correct tag.

entry.title: Consistency Validation behavior cannot be configured in BOBX for custom BO
entry.content:
Hello! I am using transaction BOBX to create a Consistency Validation for a custom business object (copied from /SCMTMS/TOR). In documentation I read that it is possible to define the behavior to do one of three options: 

  • Return messages: This represents the default behavior of consistency validation. The validation implementation returns messages for inconsistent instances to the consumer.
  • Return messages and prevent saving: Select this option for the validation impact if the inconsistency of a node instance must be solved before saving the transaction.
  • Return messages and set a consistency status: If the base object (super object) contains a consistency status, this status can be influenced by a consistency validation. Choose the appropriate status variable. When a changed instance

However, I don't see the place where to define these. Anybody knows how to achieve this? 

This is the view I have from BOBX ->

Thanks

Salvador

entry.title: Re: S4 HANA Public Cloud - API to read Storage Locations
entry.content: We helped you to accept the answer. You can unaccept it anytime if you have further questions.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud Transport Management System Setup for Transporting SAP Build Work zone Objects
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"The Cloud Transport Management System (cTMS) in SAP Business Technology Platform (BTP) automates software changes across different cloud environments. This tool streamlines the process of moving changes from development to testing and production environments, making it valuable for SAP customers using cloud-based development practices."

 

Thanks for your sharing, it really help us a lot.

 

🙂

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Goods movement bin not determined or entered-Message...
entry.content: Quick solution:>> go to "define WPT "to check type 1010 and assign the source storage type 9010 and assigne GR-ZONE to source bin if not assigned. However, you need to create this source bin if not created via /SCWM/LS01

entry.title: Re: EWM Goods movement bin not determined or entered
entry.content: Quick solution:>> go to "define WPT "to check type 1010 and assign the source storage type 9010 and assigne GR-ZONE to source bin if not assigned. However, you need to create this source bin if not created via /SCWM/LS01

entry.title: CPM Define Plan Scenarios
entry.content:
In the customizing "Define Plan Scenarios" for CPM we may see that scenarions 0PSD, 0PSM, 0PSW, 0QTM are marked as Obsolete. 

Customers want to get rid of these entries and try to figure out regarding the substitutions. We were unable to detect any notes explaining the topic. Could anyone suggest?

entry.title: SAP BW hierarchy datasource on CDS view
entry.content:
S/4 HANA system acts as source for SAP BW 7.5 on MSSQL database. SAPI connection to source.

0FUNCT_LOC_HIER is the ECC deprecated extractor in S/4 HANA. We have a CDS view as a replacement.

Existing ExtractorsData DefinitionCDSCDS Database(SQL) View
0FUNCT_LOC_HIERI_FuncnlLocationHierarchyNodeI_FuncnlLocationHierarchyNodeIFLOCHIERNODE

We aren't able to find how to steps on how we make a hierarchy datasource in S/4 HANA that uses a CDS view so that we can replicate the same in SAP BW.

Anybody has pointers , please? Do we still use BW07? what would be Table set?

entry.title: Re: Web Service Calls to Get Customer Invoice PDF from ByDesign
entry.content: Thanks a lot

entry.title: Attachments service on S4HANA Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hi All,

I am using the GET API from the attachment service API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV to retrieve attachments from a work order in the S4 public cloud environment. I provide the parameters DocumentInfoRecordDocType, DocumentInfoRecordDocVersion, DocumentInfoRecordDocNumber, and DocumentInfoRecordDocPart. Although I get a response but it only includes the attachmentcontenthash, the Content field in the response is not being populated. Anyone has an idea how to convert this SHA256 value to Base64 or XSTRING?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Auto complete (without Credit Given) when Item/program is overdue
entry.content:
Hi

We currently use programs for user onboarding learnings with learning duration of 4 months. Are there ways for system to auto complete (without credit given) for item that are overdue?

For example

  • there are 4 items in programs
  • user complete 3 items within 4 month periods
  • the remaining 1 left incomplete untill due date (4 months)
  • We want system to automatically update 1 incomplete course status to "Complete without credit given"

Thank you in advances

entry.title: The capability of SAP B1 to handle 10,000 invoices per day.
entry.content: Hi Experts.  There are rumors among SAP B1 competitors that SAP B1 can handle only about 2500 invoices per day.  My question is “From a technical standpoint, can SAP B1 handle loading up to 10,000 invoices per day, where each invoice contains an average of 10 inventory items (i.e., around 100,000 records per day), given that the database is SQL Server and invoices are loaded via API in daily time intervals?”

entry.title: How to Create Dynamic Tab Pages in MDK on Button Click
entry.content:
Hello @Jitendra_Kansal,

I have created a page in the Mobile Development Kit (MDK) to calculate the result of a test by getting the test parameters from a form cell and performing calculations on it. Now, I want to enhance this functionality by adding a tab in the same page with the same form cell to calculate the result of the same test multiple times.

Could anyone guide me on how to create dynamic tab pages in MDK on a button click? Specifically, I am looking for a way to dynamically add tabs that contain the same form cell structure for repeated calculations.

Any help or examples would be greatly appreciated!

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: DMEEX One format tree for multiple XML files
entry.content:
Dear experts,

May I seek for your knowledge to help me configure one format tree in DMEE that will generate multiple XML files when running F110. 

The XML file should be generated per company code, bank account number, and payment method.

Best regards

entry.title: Re: A 25x faster mta.yaml build for SAP CAP Node.js projects

entry.title: Re: Connect to sboGuiApi
entry.content:
Hi ramco1917,

Kindly always use the following value to make the UI API connection:

0030002C0030002C00530041005000420044005F00440061007400650076002C0050004C006F006D0056004900490056

It is supplied by SAP and is valid for both development and run time.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Problems with the service layer in the Order POST
entry.content:
Hi Arzch,

Ideally, it should trigger an error stating that 'DocDueDate is missing' or something similar.

The reason it's returning a 'Bad Post' error could be that you're using it differently or not capturing the correct response from the Service Layer.

Regardless, it's good to hear that the issue has been resolved.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: PO Status in Manage Purchase Order
entry.content:
I would like to know if there is any available API which include PO Invoiced status.

Best Regards,

Khaing ZIn

entry.title: Re: Connection To Database
entry.content:
Hi ramco1917,

When working with add-ons in SAP Business One, there can be 3 types of connection:

  • UI API connection: When you need to simulate the UI API behaviour.
  • DI API connection: When you need to automate the Business Processes without simulating UI API behaviour.
  • UI-DI connection: When you need to simulate the UI API behaviour, also need to automate the processes.

The sample you have shared, is a DI API connection. The connect which you make via Command Line, is generally a UI API connection.

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: How can the functionality to check for duplicate BP records in SAP S/4 HANA
entry.content:
Hello!

There is a functionality to check for duplicate BP records in SAP S/4 HANA. How can it be activated?

Thanks!

Using ABAP service keys does not not work.

entry.title: Re: Creating custom UI5 control from D3 chart
entry.content:
Hi Community,

"D3 stands for Data Driven Documents, which creates graphical visualization based on the data. The requirement for our project was to create a tree structure where the parents may have many children with different properties, and we needed to represent their state in different colors as well."

 

Thanks for your selfless sharing, it really help us a lot.

🙂

 

Regards,

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: QUEUE_NOT_EMPTY in CHECK_REQUIREMENTS phase in patch...
entry.content:
Hi,
please check https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_ADD-ON_INSTALLATION_TOOL_AND_SUPPORT_PACKAGE_MANAGER/42ca93a619694a2fb4a8f3d655c5132a/493e937e29002221e10000000a42189d.html?q=CHECK_REQUIREMENTS 

This error means that previous processes are not completed

Kind regards

Karin

entry.title: Re: Request for Guidance on Resolving ChaRM Issue Post-SA...
entry.content:
Dear Srinivas,

Normally, if on-prem system is migrated to the cloud, and the old on-prem systems are not used any more, the Solution Manager 7.2 has the capability to merge the migrated system automatically. That's the duplicated system with extended SID will not be generated. If duplicated system issue occurs, please see resolution in KBA 1727294 - AS Java/ABAP System move functionality & 1694004 - Dealing with duplicate technical system names (SIDs). In this case, there is no need to recreate the RFCs or change Charm cycle.

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: Why choose SAP Business Network Global Track and Trace – Tailor Your Tracking Process (7 of 7)
entry.content: Thanks Doug - this series makes it so much easier for us to be able to articulate the differences between the approaches to tracking. Thankyou for the effort and the great examples. 🙂

entry.title: I would like to know if there is any available API
Re: Document Information Extraction - SAPUI5 Ajax POST call
entry.content:
Hi ,

I'm getting CORS error in ajax post call. Can you suggest any solution for this ? 

My ajax post call code ->

  $.ajax({
                    url: "https://aiservices-trial-dox.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/document-information-extraction/v1/document/jobs",
                    method: "POST",
                    timeout: 0,
                    headers: {
                        Authorization: `Bearer ${token}`
                    },
                    processData: false,
                    mimeType: "multipart/form-data",
                    contentType: false,
                    data: oFormData,
                    success: function (response) {
                        console.log(response);
                    },
                    // Error handling
                    error: function (error) {
                        console.log(error);
                    }
                });
 

I configured my destination with help of service key of instance of document extraction.

My Api url in destination is -> https://aiservices-trial-dox.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/document-information-extraction/v1/

Is is correct format of API url or should I apply https://aiservices-trial-dox.cfapps.us10.hana.ondemand.com/document-information-extraction/v1/swagger.json this as api url ?

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: Talent Intelligence Hub - Myths and Misconceptions - Part 1 (Prerequisites)
entry.content: Hi @DaliborPetrovic will TIH provides any built-in library for skill so organization can use that library.

entry.title: Re: Condition Type - Pricing Procedure
entry.content:
Hello 

While checking the condition records did you check with old date#02.20.2021? probably condition type ZAQW would be maintained with Access Sequence when 02.20.2021 and now Access sequence would have removed.

You please check the condition record of ZAQW with date 02.20.2021. and let's update us. Probably you will find records with old date 02.20.2021.

entry.title: can find what the generic withholding reports look like and what fields included
Re: PO Status in Manage Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hello Khaing ZIn,

the status on the header is just the summery of the item lines. This header status is not directly available in API, but you can use the API to read the item information. If sufficient for your requirement I would read the "IsFinallyInvoiced" indicator (see screenshot from documentation)

Regards Johannes

entry.title: Re: Webservice calls on Solution manager wily introscope
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

On the ABAP system, transaction SRT_UTIL or SLG1 helps to monitor the web services. Solution Manager monitors the web services and provides the monitoring content as mentioned in the following link:
https://support.sap.com/en/alm/solution-manager/expert-portal/monitoring-of-integration-scenarios/web-service-channel.html?anchorId=section_1711425531

But I am sorry to say that the web service CPU monitoring is not listed in the content. 

Best regards,
Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: How to create your own ATC check in ABAP Development Tools for Eclipse
entry.content:
Hello @harish_dahima ,

Please refer to below link to create outbound service, communication scenario and communication arrangement for a particular on-premise system to retrieve the RFC destination at run time to call RFC to on premise system:
Connect to Your On-Premise System from SAP BTP, ABAP Environment Using RFC | SAP Tutorials

DATA(lo_destination) = cl_rfc_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement( comm_scenario = 'Z_OUTBOUND_RFC_###_CSCEN'
" Communication scenario
service_id = 'Z_OUTBOUND_RFC_###_SRFC'
" Outbound service ).

Thanks and Regards

Nitin Goyal

entry.title: Re: Webservice calls on Solution manager wily introscope
entry.content: Dear Customer, I have added tag "NW ABAP Web Services" for web service CPU monitoring issue. This will help attract more attention from my colleagues to the question. Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: invoking Unbound action without param dialog in v4
entry.content:
parameterValues should be a collection of name/value pairs:

parameterValues: [
  { name: 'couponId', value: '9b88...' }
]

entry.title: Re: Configuring Business Partner (Vendor) in S/4 Hana for New Implementations
entry.content: Nice blog

entry.title: Re: **Request for Tools to Create Developer Key**
entry.content: Dear Kiran, since an answer was provided to your question, and there has been no other activity on the topic, we have accepted the answer as a solution on your behalf. You can unaccept it anytime if the answer provided was not helpful enough or if you have further questions. Thank you for bringing this question to SAP Community! Best regards, Vera Jiang

entry.title: Re: api_warehouse_order_task_2

Hi Glyba_Dmitrii,

Thank you, One more addition- perhaps APIs are different based on different Product ( S/4 HANA On Primise, S/4 HANA CLoud Private,... etc )  . Please see the link for cancellation API onS/4 HANA On Primise EWM  .

Kind Regards,

Ajit

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS - BTP deploy failed: throw cds.error `Didn't find auth implementation for ${config}`
entry.content: This was changed 3 years ago: https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/archive/2022/jun22#auth-by-default

entry.title: Re: Deactivate Group Reporting Preparation Ledger
entry.content:
Hi VMSAPExplorer,

once the preparation ledger has been activated you can not deactivate it by yourself, as far as I am aware only SAP can deactivate it for you.

Best regards

Stephan

entry.title: Regarding the Depreciation Area Inquiry
entry.content:
When intangible assets are depreciated using the direct method, how should the depreciation area for the asset class be set?

The default depreciation area is for the indirect method, and I added a depreciation area for the direct method, which was then assigned to asset classes requiring the direct method.

For the indirect method, I set the depreciation type as "No Depreciation," and for the direct method, I set the depreciation type as "Straight-Line Method."

Is this the general setup? Please confirm.

below attachment is "Asset Class" form

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: MISSING MANDATE REFERENCE
entry.content: Hello Henrike, we are posting basically with two apps: 1) Create Outgoing Invoices • with this APP the Sepa Mandate field is not available, we cannot fill it manually. 2) Upload customer open Items • we have added a custom field following this link, but it is not working https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/918bca53037f408f91a2295d04ac16bc/7bfbdf507e6f4f2884d89e11fb266b08.html Regards Davide

entry.title: Re: Keeping Up-to date with SAP Cloud ALM
entry.content: Very nice and informative blog

entry.title: Re: 5000 resources error while deploying application on BTP
entry.content: Have a look in your BTP Cockpit > Cloud Foundry > Spaces. Your space will have 2 'Org Quota' charts, 1 for Memory and 1 for Services. Each 1GB of memory assigned to the quota gives access to 100 services. These 'services' refer to the number of 'service instances' you can create in that space. So if your account has 50GB or CF Runtime assigned, you can create up to 5000 service instances.

entry.title: How to check the compatiblity of SAP 2023 ABAP server can run on SUSE Linux 15 SP2.
entry.content: As per PAM, it only shows for kernel 7.53 only as below but SAP 2023 using 7.93.. Please advise.

entry.title: Re: Deactivate Group Reporting Preparation Ledger
entry.content:
Have you already read the OSS notes 3412034 and 3234878? In these notes, you can find the reasons for issues regarding preparation ledger and release from ACDOCA to ACDOCU.

Kind regards
Felix

entry.title: Consuming GraphQL API in SAP UI5 application.
entry.content:
Consuming GraphQL API in SAPUI5

Introduction:

GraphQL is a query language for APIs that enables clients to request exactly the data they need. GraphQL is gaining popularity for its flexibility in data fetching. Unlike REST APIs, where multiple endpoints are needed, GraphQL allows clients to fetch only the data they require using a single query. In this blog, we’ll walk through integrating a GraphQL API into a SAPUI5 application using Apollo Client.

Key Features of GraphQL:

  • Single Endpoint: All data queries are sent to a single endpoint, simplifying API management.
  • Client-Specified Queries: Clients define the structure of the response, ensuring they receive only the necessary data.
  • Strongly Typed Schema: APIs are defined by a schema, enabling better validation and introspection.

Comparing OData and GraphQL:

In API query languages, GraphQL and OData stand out as powerful tools that facilitate data retrieval and manipulation. While both serve similar purposes, they exhibit distinct characteristics that cater to different use cases and development paradigms. Here we are discussing the key differences and similarities between GraphQL and OData, supported by examples to illustrate their unique features.

Similarities:

  • Query Language for APIs: Both GraphQL and OData serve as query languages for APIs, enabling clients to request specific data from a server.
  • Flexibility: Both allow clients to specify exactly which fields they want to retrieve, reducing over-fetching of data and improving performance.
  • Hierarchical Structure: Both follow a hierarchical structure, making it easy to navigate and request related data.

Differences:

Schema Definition:

 GraphQL requires the explicit definition of a schema, which outlines the types of data that can be queried.

type User {

id: ID!

name: String!

email: String!

}

 

type Query {

user(id: ID!): User

}

 

OData uses the Entity Data Model (EDM) to define the data model, including entities and relationships.

<EntityType Name="User"><Key>    <PropertyRef Name="Id" /></Key><Property Name="Id" Type="Edm.Int32" Nullable="false" /><Property Name="Name" Type="Edm.String" /><Property Name="Email" Type="Edm.String" /></EntityType>

 

Query Language:

GraphQL uses a specific query language that allows clients to request exactly what they need.

query {user(id: "1") {    name    email}}

 

OData relies on URL conventions for querying data.

GET /Users(1)?$select=Name,Email

 

Complex Queries:

GraphQL excels at handling complex queries, allowing clients to traverse deeply nested data structures.

query {user(id: "1") {    name    posts {    title    comments {        text    }    }}}

 

OData supports complex queries, but it may require more verbose URLs.

GET /Users(1)?$expand=Posts($expand=Comments($select=Text)),Name,Email

 

Metadata:

  • GraphQL does not have built-in metadata endpoints
  • OData exposes metadata, allowing clients to dynamically discover the structure of the API.

·         GET /$metadata

 

 

Batch Operations:

 GraphQL does not have built-in support for batch operations.

OData supports batch requests, allowing multiple operations to be grouped into a single HTTP request.

 

 

When to Use GraphQL:

  • Complex Data Relationships: Use GraphQL when dealing with complex relationships between data entities, as it allows for efficient traversal of nested data structures.
  • Frontend-Driven Development: GraphQL is an excellent choice when the frontend team has a strong influence on data requirements, as it enables them to request exactly the data they need.
  • Real-Time Data Needs: If real-time data updates are crucial, GraphQL subscriptions provide a powerful mechanism for real-time data synchronization between the server and clients.
  • Single Page Applications (SPAs): For SPAs where optimizing network requests is crucial, GraphQL can reduce over-fetching of data, improving performance.
  • Microservices Architecture: GraphQL is well-suited for micro services environments, where different services may expose different types of data, allowing clients to aggregate information efficiently.
  • Mobile Applications: In mobile applications, where minimizing data transfer is critical for performance and battery life, GraphQL’s fine-grained control over data retrieval is advantageous.

When to Use OData

  • Enterprise-Level Applications: In large enterprise applications with existing OData services or legacy systems that support OData, it may be more straightforward to continue using OData.
  • Query Optimization and Caching: OData’s query options for filtering, sorting, and paging can be highly efficient, especially when working with large datasets. Additionally, caching can be effectively implemented.
  • Metadata-Driven Development: OData’s metadata capabilities are valuable when dynamic discovery of API structure is needed.
  • Batch Operations: In scenarios where batch operations are essential, OData provides built-in support, simplifying complex data operations.
  • Strongly-Typed Environments: In environments where a strongly-typed data model is preferred, OData’s use of the Entity Data Model (EDM) aligns well with this paradigm.
  • Existing OData Ecosystem: When integrating with existing systems, services, or ecosystems that already support OData, it makes sense to continue using OData to leverage existing infrastructure.

 

Apollo Client:

Apollo Client is a JavaScript library used to consume GraphQL APIs. It manages queries, caching, and state management efficiently.

Consuming GraphQL in SAP UI5 application:

  1. Set up the project:
  • Create a new SAPUI5 project using SAP Business Application Studio or a local setup.

 

 

  • Initialize an SAPUI5 app using ui5 init (if using OpenUI5).

 

  1. Install Apollo Client:

Run the following command inside your SAPUI5 project to install Apollo Client and GraphQL

“npm install @Apollo/client graphql”

 

 

Configure Apollo Client in SAPUI5:

We need to set up Apollo Client to communicate with the GraphQL API.

Create a new file apollo.js inside the webapp folder and add the following code:

apollo.js:

 

 

Include Apollo Client in index.html :

Modify your index.html file to include the Apollo Client CDN:

 

 

<script src="https://unpkg.com/@apollo/client@3.8.0/core/core.umd.js"></script>

  <script src="https://unpkg.com/@apollo/client@3.8.0/cache/cache.umd.js"></script>

  <script src="https://unpkg.com/graphql@16.6.0/graphql.min.js"></script>

 

Fetch Data from GraphQL API in SAPUI5:

 

Modify Component.js to import and use Apollo Client:

 

 

 

 

Display GraphQL Data in SAPUI5 Table:

 

Modify View1.view.xml to include a Table:

 

Bind Data to the Table in Controller:

Modify View1.controller.js to fetch data and bind it to the table:

 

Run and Test the Application:

Start the SAPUI5 application using npm start or run it in SAP Business Application Studio.

The table should now display country data fetched from the GraphQL API.

 

 

 

Conclusion:

 In this blog we have installed ApolloClient in an SAPUI5 application, connected to a GraphQL API and fetched data displayed in the table. This integration allows SAPUI5 applications to fetch only the necessary data, optimizing performance and flexibility. Further we can also explore complexity queries by connecting with systems like AWS cloud etc.

i have created a sales order in public cloud of three line item, when i am trying to create a delivery only one line item is appearing in the delivery screen. and for rest two line item i am getting below error. please guide me with the solution.

entry.title: Re: Connection To Database

entry.title: Re: Connect to sboGuiApi
entry.content: Thanks a lot

entry.title: Re: EC promotion eligibility and Mass upload
entry.content:
Hi Vinkamath,

You can control the promote link via RBP, not with eligibility rules. With eligibility rules, you can control whether an employee's promotion increase column is greyed out or not.

It is not possible to mass import EC promotions in the Compensation form. When using the standard promotion feature, all changes must be made in the Promotion window before they can be published in EC.

entry.title: Re: The capability of SAP B1 to handle 10,000 invoices pe...
entry.content:
Hi,

Competitors will always claim that their system is better and faster, but writing 100,000 records per day is a lot for any database / ERP system in the SMB space.

Whether it is SAP Business One, or any other system, I recommend that you require a load test on a test system, and a demonstration of how usable that test system is, both while invoices are being written at that rate, and considering that the database will grow very large very fast, I also recommend that you require a demonstration of a (test) system with a database size of at least 500 GB.

In short, don't take anyone's word for it, except mine of course 😉

Regards,

Johan

entry.title: Re: APIs for me.sap.com
entry.content:
Dear customer,

According to KBA 3554766, APIs are not provided for SAP for Me.

Hope this answers your question.

Thanks and regards,
Joanna

entry.title: Re: Simple Table Maintenance in SAP Fiori Using UI5 Smart Controls
entry.content: I understand your approach, but if a BTP side-by-side scenario is an option, I’d recommend using the "Custom Business Configurations" (F4579) app.

entry.title: SAP BW Datasource for ACDOCP
entry.content:
Hi,

SAP support is ending Dec 2025 for the old COSS and COSP tables and our company will use ACDOCP table. We have a couple of standard SAP extractors that load data from COSS and COSP. 

Will these extractors continue to work or do we need to migrate to a new datasource based on ACDOCP table.

Regards,

Paul

entry.title: Re: SAP Integration Suite - Message Status Overview by Sender & Receiver
entry.content: And also helpful to monitor from Cloud ALM!

entry.title: Re: Rounding Amount Carryforward and Bill Rounding for SA...
entry.content:
Hi,
in Convergent Invoicing you have 2 different rounding functionalities as:

RND_INV_DOC       Rounding per Invoicing Document Rounding per Invoicing Document
RND_POST_DOC    Rounding per Posting Document

Just read the online documentation 'Invoicing Functions' and more details about the rounding: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_ON-PREMISE/fc005cff24e9430691c1e05ffd5f0eee/bfaa945183fd9302e10000000a44538d.html?version=2023.003

entry.title: MBLB New Fields
entry.content:
Hi,

How can I add a new column to the MBLB screen?

entry.title: Re: Position reclassification-one of the most useful (and least understood)-aspects of Employee Cent
entry.content: Thank you for this clear and well-explained video! The examples made it easy to understand.

entry.title: Re: ABAP RAP How to use dates for additional binding in value helps?
entry.content:
Hello @Kostiantyn_K 

I encountered the same issue and managed to resolve it by creating a custom entity that pulls data from my value help entity (in your case, zc_value_help).

In the implementation of the custom entity, I utilized the filters object of the io_request object to retrieve the filters defined in the additional bindings annotation. Once the value of your date filter is saved locally, you can use it to perform a selection on your value help entity.

It would be much more convenient if there were an additional annotation field, such as "operator," which would allow you to specify it directly in your consumption value help definition.

@Andre_Fischer  : Is there a more efficient way to approach this

Best regards,
Leif Johannsen

entry.title: Re: Enhanced Microsoft Teams Integration with SAP S/4HANA Cloud, Public Edition
entry.content: Hello '' enable share "As Tab" and to enable share "As Card", additional settings are required as detailed in the following Help Documentation - Integrating Microsoft Teams.'' this part not avaible can you send teams setting.

entry.title: Re: Migrate your code with UI5 linter – Autofix has landed
entry.content:
@FabioPagoti wrote:

Nice tool. Are here any plans to make this available by default when new projects are created in BAS?

We are already in contact with the team taking care of SAP Business Application Studio. I will give an update as soon as there are news on this. Thanks a lot for raising this topic here.

entry.title: Re: Multiple object constructors
entry.content: use factory pattern!

entry.title: Re: Connection To Database
entry.content:
Hi ramco1917,

Refer to the following sample code:

1. Connect to the UI API as in a regular UI API add-on (SAP Business One must be running):

Dim SboGuiApi As SAPbouiCOM.SboGuiApi

Dim sConnectionString As String

SboGuiApi = New SAPbouiCOM.SboGuiApi

'// connect to a running SBO Application

If connectionString = "" Then

   If Environment.GetCommandLineArgs().Length = 1 Then

sConnectionString = "0030002C0030002C00530041005000420044005F00440061007400650076002C0050004C006F006D0056004900490056"

   Else

     sConnectionString = Environment.GetCommandLineArgs.GetValue(1)

   End If

   Else

     ''connection string was filled before

End If

SboGuiApi.Connect(sConnectionString)

'// get an initialized application object

SBO_Application = SboGuiApi.GetApplication()

2. Connect to DI API using Company.GetDICompany:

Dim oCompany As SAPbobsCOM.Company

'//get DI company (via UI)

oCompany = SBO_Application.Company.GetDICompany()

---------------------------------------------------------

'// there is no need to call DI API Company.Connect method

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Re: Comparing MD07 - MD04 Vs Monitor material coverage app - 1/2
entry.content:
Great Explanation!

My Question is, if i have a Material that isn´t used anymore, can i hide that so it wont show up in the Material Lists?

I can´t delete it, otherwise all the data we may need again is gone.

Thanks for your help!
